channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: I talked to two people today about rent. — 122 replies — 329.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
I talked to two people today about rent.

Open thread • Replies: 122 • Updated: 2026-06-16 11:59 UTC

OP

I talked to two people today about rent.

The first guy said he lives in Atlanta and pays about $2,300 a month in rent. I mentioned that works out to roughly $27,600 a year, which I personally think is a lot for rent. He also told me he was let go from a sales job at a small company about two weeks ago. Small company = low pay. When I commented on the rent being high, he responded by saying, “maybe it is a lot for you.”

I told him it is a terrible financial decision.
I also told him that I live in a major city and my monthly taxes alone are more than that.

Later, I spoke with another guy who pays around $2,000 a month for a luxury apartment. That’s about $24,000 a year. I didn’t ask about his income or job situation, but I shared that I thought the annual rent cost seemed very high.

I kept telling him his rent was a waste of money and he should buy a house. He told me he might not want to to live somewhere for so long. I asked him how he expected to build wealth. The conversation went back and forth with me saying it was a waste of “money down the drain.” He eventually admitted it was hard and bad use of money and insulted me with “life is hard when YOU don’t live in mommies basement.”
Wow.
He is literally throwing money down the drain and I trying to give me good advice.

It made me wonder if people commonly spend over $20,000–$30,000 a year on rent? And if so, how common is that relative to income and lifestyle choices?

Please look at picrel. Do people spend so much of their paycheque on rent? How does anyone become rich?

Curious what others think about this.

Early replies (first 3)

62372611
>>62372604
>I talked to two people today about rent.
no you didn't

62372621
>$24k per year rent is throwing money down the drain
>$50k per year interest payments for 30 years to "own" the same thing is building wealth

Lol

Lmao

62372624
>>62372604

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62373568
>>62373339
>>62373330
>>62373351
>>62373407
If real estate is such a no-brainer then why are you so defensive about it?

62373571
>>62373556
>>62373560
the rich buy homes as vanity projects, but they didn't become rich because they own a home. not spending money (which is the exact opposite of home ownership btw) is only a way to delay or reduce financial disaster. the only way to make financial gains is to increase income

62373573
>>62373543
I have these conversations outside the gym, doesn’t mean I should post on /fit/. Wtf are you talking about? I take my competitive gaming seriously during the evenings.

62373575
>>62373566
good point. He's here more often than I am and I'm here a lot

62373579
>>62373568
Cause you are fucking ignorant.
Sure home prices rise and drop, but during downturns, you really get to see which areas were valueable. Your cope is renting, which I have nothing against but to pretend home ownership is worthless is peak cope.

62373581
>>62373573
I don't think you do take it seriously
You were playing games in this very thread. is posting here not a distraction?

62373586
>>62373568
It ISNT a no brainer anymore.
That’s where the k shaped economy comes in. Owning a house comfortably in the top 10% means the bottom 90% are already far behind and falling farther behind each quarter.

62373589
>>62373581
?
I take my gaming seriously since the game is competitive and ranked and fun.
I am locked in each evening.

62373592
>>62373571
Once again, wealth gap. 2026 is fucking crazy.
Dollar down, stocks up. But people have no ownership of anything. Wasn’t “own nothing and be happy” part of agenda 2030?

62373594
>>62373102
>>62373589
arguing with poor brokies is locking in.
really?

62373595
>>62373566
You go outside to let the bull in.

62373597
Daily autistic browncel thread

62373598
>>62373594
I ain’t arguing in a game, wtf are you talking about?

62373600
>>62373595
you're a worthless piece of shit and people here are tired of you

62373604
>>62373594
That post was at 10pm…
My conversations today were around 3pm. What the fuck are you on?
Discuss topic in op or fuck off.

62373607
>>62373600
Ok, just don’t keep the bull waiting.

62373616
>>62373598
you were arguing on /biz/, then off playing a match?
did that not happen?
>>62373607
that post was for me what are you doing?

62373618
Good thread op.

62373626
>>62373618
samefag fail

you never seem to figure out ID's

we can see how many times you respond to yourself.

62373639
>>62373626
/thread

62373643
>>62373616
I wasn’t arguing on /biz/. I was discussing business and finance with other anons. Why are you here?

62373726
OP is a fat retard who probably stinks to high hell

62373757
>>62373618
lol what a humiliating samefag

62373789
>>62372604
>Average American home requires an income over $200k a year
Grim

62373858
>>62373789
To live away from certain “people,” yeah.

62374466
>>62372604
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62374484
>>62372611
this thread was posted by a mentally ill discord tranny who previously nameniggered as OCPD. he posts this crap 12+ hour a day, every day. he frequently uses the leto furfag residential VPN shitposting front end to change IDs and reply to his own posts.

62374504
>>62373618
oh man lol. Why are you posting these almost every day? You sound insufferable. Go back.

62374657
>>62372621
What? My whole mortage is only 15k per year

62374661
>>62372604
It's very common for people to be rentslaves or house-poor their entire lives because they've been psyop shamed into avoiding living with their own family.

item.title: How do I fully Divest from the USA — 50 replies — 107.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
How do I fully Divest from the USA

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-06-16 11:53 UTC

OP

Anyone who’s still investing in U.S markets at this point is abetting fascism. I want a total European portfolio to support Liberal democracy

Early replies (first 3)

62368148
I unironically do this and it's easy.

Just a case of EU+UK tracker ETFs + Canada and Australia + Japan-Taiwan-SK. I balance it out with pan-European IT and defence ETFs to balance out the overabundance of financials and industrials.

This gives you a portfolio of liberal democracies.

62368154
>>62368132
>fascism

62368162
>>62368154
You’re just uneducated on history

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62369274
>>62369243
NTA, but sounds like he is talking about Project 2025.

62370119
You shouldnt divest away from strategic US sectors. If the US falls, the last thing on your mind will be your portfolio, so an investment in the US is an investment into the future.

62370160
>>62368132
>fighting for their rights to perform PDA at work
Lmao for fucks sake man... Euros are such a bunch of degenerate faggots

62370630
>>62368132
Whatever companies you buy, you have to make sure they dont use any products from sp500 comapnies. Good luck!

62370666
>>62368132
Only if you hate money. Even European defense companies are down this year. America and the AI companies are just dominating everything.

America is evil but Satan and his jews rule this world and have ALL the money.

62370699
I hope no one ITT lets his investments be influenced by posts containing the words "Jewsa", "pozzed", "Jewmericans" or "Satan"

62370702
>>62368132
>this is the difference between us
having creeps in your workplace?

62370714
Its impossible, even if you only invest in thirdie companies their biggest customer is burger. Even if you only invest in sanctioned countries they use third parties to sell to burgers

62370718
>>62370714
Tl;dr - the great satan wins

62370721
>>62370160
It's just gonna be bunch of gays "expressing" themselves.

62370725
>>62368132
Have you not learnt to never bet against America?

62370726
>>62370630
>>62370160
>>62370119

>>62368132
Isn't Spain giving workers breaks to masturbate?
Kekaroonies.

62370733
I wonder if there are people as retarded as OP but unironically.
I'm glad I sold all my EU crap at a + because this shit is going up in flames.

62370754
This place is fucking dying and we are being ruled over by burectautic women and boomers stuck in yesterday. Do not put money in here. This place will be a testaments what happens when retarded libs take over and encourage societies to rot in the name of progressivism

62370778
>>62368148
Thanks bro, i’ve been wondering how to invest so that my investments both generate money and strenghten european enlightenment.

62370787
>>62368279
UK is more like USA than like rest of europe.

62370799
>>62368999
Enjoy sucking Putin’s dick like your country already did for many years, retard. It’s either the union or sucking either Trump’s or Putin’s dick.

62370817
>>62368132
But what if i want to abet fascism?

62370824
>>62370754
I wonder when the first big cunt takes a look at Germany's raw numbers from 2022 onward and nopes the fuck out. And the EU is just Germany / German money on a proxy.

62370828
>>62370725
>>62370666
>>62370119
Kek americans coping hard here. You guys got lucky with the world wars but just because you got lucky one doesn’t mean you will keep outperforming everything forever. Everyone tells you to keep buying at the top.

62370935
>>62368132
Listen here you capitalistic chud. In Europe we DO NOT invest, that’s for capitalist American pigs. What you MUST do with your left over money is hand it over to the brave and hardworking souls from North Africa who need our help now more than ever. We OWE them and it’s YOUR personal responsibility to be held accountable for the actions of your ancestors, and provide them with proper care and a bright livelihood. So go donate as much all your left over money that you don’t even need, only a facist scumbag would do otherwise.

62370975
>>62370935
>account based in indorussia

62370977
>>62368132
lol

62370980
>>62370754
The wealthy men of today are a bunch of dysgenic narcissists as well, so with the world having no means of justice in this generation, evacuating the entire North American continent and sending everybody back to where they came from is starting to look like a relatively appealing outcome at this point. It would at least establish how completely unacceptable this society was and that its history should never repeat again.

62370981
>>62368132
Have fun getting raped by taxes to fund gender affirming care and immigrants.

62373787
>>62370787
Sweden is the America of Europe. Except if the gayest commie New England Democrats had total power for 100 years.

62373955
>>62368132

62374187
If you want to support your "european liberal democracy", it is very easy depending on who you are. If youre a brown muslim invader, then just get on state welfare and eventually ram your car through a Christmas village or attack random Whites. If youre White, then castrate yourself and give up the lands your ancestors have defended for thousands of years without a fight. Ez

62374218
>>62370981
Dividends and gains are tax free in UK ISA accounts. I pay 0 tax. But you either didn't know this because you're a retard or you did know it and you're just too dumb to understand.

62374644
>>62370799
>>62370778
EU =/= Europe
Europe = mostly White people with different cultures
EU = globohomo aka state sponsored faggory, kalergi style mass migration and talmudism

62374550

It's okay it's okay
don't listen to the bullies online
You are mommy's smart little boy
of course you are a genius honey
those meanies are all jist stupid

62374675
>>62374520

I keep seeing retards mention this. Do you even realize it's just a meaningless number?

62374683

>MARKET CAP IS JUST A NUMBER, MONEY IS NOT REAL!

62374713

62374718

62372553

62372554
depends entirely on the price of bitcoin. investors see it on spacex balance sheet and that is the entire value of the company

62372585

62372849

62372879

62372886
>>62372549

62372887

62372910
>>62372625

62374410

62374414

62374429

62374461

62374477

62374487

62374499

62374502

Stay poor then.

62374503
>>62372549
$1000

item.title: POOMP YOU'RE MISSING OUT WE'RE ALL GETTING RICH — 34 replies — 12.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
POOMP YOU'RE MISSING OUT WE'RE ALL GETTING RICH

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-06-16 09:39 UTC

OP

POOMP
YOU'RE MISSING OUT
WE'RE ALL GETTING RICH

Early replies (first 3)

62372990
wow their revenue is going to 200x. you would have to be a retard not to buy calls

62372997
>>62372988
lol, this is their entire plan to remove wealth from the public before the end of the world? I don't think so. SPCX isn't even worth the current price. Go look at what they did on the futures markets. SPCX has already been listed for markets as a futures contract asset and its chart completely dumped from 2,200 to 160.

62373002
The man who owns the company saying its going to go up!? OMG BUY LADS

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62373008
>>62372997
>corporate share split and index rebasing that occurred ahead of the historic SpaceX (SPCX) IPO.
Shill

62373065
>>62372988
So how many shares to buy? How many needed to make it

62373067
>CEO: i think my company is worth infinity dollarydoos
>investors: HOLY FUCK BUY NOW

goyim are retards who should be enslaved

62373068
>>62372988
if a singular company doing mostly meaningless economic activity is able to actually create $1T revenue in a singular business year around 2030;
simply imagine how much trillions of revenue essential economical endeavors must be making within the same time period. (probably quire a lot)

now hypothetically try to extrapolate from this the amount of outstanding currency/debt/credit roaming around the economy directly and how high asset prices would be, which are nearly 100% of the time are prone to derive their value from the total outstanding currency/debt/credit.

one would come to the conclusion that this would mean there is mind boggling, reality bending inflation in both currency/debt/credit AND THEREFORE consumer prices and asset prices ahead.

now remember how well you were faring with actual inflation in the past.

yeah.

good luck.

62373084
>>62373067
none of the investors believe this, they all just think that they can time the market and sell thier garbage to a more credulous retard

62373086
>>62373068
>reddit spacing
i bet you said the same about tesla

62373112
>>62373086
you seem confused.

perhaps you are confusing stock price/market cap and revenue.

62373124
>>62372988
this sort of bullshit on social media should be illegal to say by the owner of the company. blatant price manipulation.

62373142
You're laughing now. You won't be laughing in 2030 when Tyrone and Rajesh fly to Mars on US debt.

62373147
>>62373124
It is illegal, but the current admin won’t prosecute it.

62373152
>>62372988
Im less poor than I was yesterday
Thanks Elon

62373154
>>62373112
i trust Elon over some random doom poster

62373176
>>62373154
Because you are castrated goyim

62373183
>>62373176
Youre just seething because you didn't buy the IPO and are Sidelined for the golden bull run (again)

62373215
>>62373008
None of this happened. I'm talking about SPCX futures being listed on Coinbase months before this cattle IPO launch and hype. So now that SPCX IPO'ed, what does Coinbase do? They hide the previous futures chart to reflect the current IPO stock on the futures chart when the fucking futures chart showed they started at 2,200 in liquid contracts to than just dump to 160. Thats why the IPO was at 160. Its a giant fucking scam. Elon's personal piggy bank.

62373236
so where is the money gonna flow when the rugging starts? i already took out my initial gamble play now im just riding house money, all in DRAM again?

62373255
>>62373004
The word you're looking for is "amass" you esl dipshit. remove yourself from my board NOW

62373272
>>62373255
>The word you're looking for is "amass" you esl dipshit. remove yourself from my board NOW
Is this a spelling bee, you pedantic little shit? kys

62373345
FOMO IN NOW THIS IS YOUR LAST CHANCE TO MAKE IT

62373347
>>62372988
WAGMI!!!!! :D

62373379
>>62373183
I’m mad, that’s for sure
I think mostly sad, none of this stuff pops off when i have money to gamble

62373386
>>62373215
that anon u r replying to explained it to you . if u shorted the coinbase futures 1 millisecond before it changed to the actual IPO price nothing would have changed in your account for p&l , it is a rebase not a revaluation

62373403
>>62373386
I never said i shorted the futures, I shorted SPCX IPO if that wasn't obvious.

62374320
>>62373236
Israel

62374323
>>62373236
Bitcoin.

62374326
>>62372988
>the shittiest AI is going to have 3 trillion revenue
I'm going all in anthropic

62374344
>>62372988
Revenue from what?

62374347
>>62374326
3 trillion revenue from where?

62374349
>>62374347
slop generated from data centers in space

62374350
>>62374344
>>62374347
covid money printer

item.title: What made you still hold BTC? — 21 replies — 12.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
What made you still hold BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-06-16 10:39 UTC

OP

Bitcoin has gone through multiple cycles, crashes, and endless criticism, yet many continue to hold. What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

Early replies (first 3)

62371733
>>62371718
>What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

62371807
The only reason to ever sell bitcoin is to buy more at a lower price.

62371917
>>62371807
correct
>waiting for a good entry

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62372043
If you look at the last 5 years, half of the time BTC was higher than it is now.

The Nasdaq only goes up and is 2x since 5 years.

BTC won't explode 10x from here, if you're in crypto you want huge gains. We're gambling. BTC is boring and you don't even have a good reason for why it will outperform an NFT. It certainly has 30x the risk.

62372051
>>62372043
I wanted to say an ETF, but yeah I also don't know if it will outperform bored apes desu.

If you buy crypto, gamble properly.
If you don't want to gamble, buy an ETF.

62372056
>>62371718
Are they going to stop printing money?

62372059
>>62372043
My boomer father, who invested a big chunk of his portfolio in btc a couple years ago near its low, is now exiting. I think that's as good a sign as any that it's over for bitcope

62372126
>>62371733
Neither is the internet, yet here we are.

62372189
>>62371718
Unwavering belief that BTC is how WAGMI.

62372279
It's like a runescape party hat without the duplication glitch.

62372380
>>62371718
BTC was created by kraken, coinbase and binance in 2017. Upon launch they confused their users into thinking this new asset was Bitcoin. They did this to convince miners to chase profit on a minority fork. Miners are understood to be the adopters, voters and stewards of the technology. Getting the majority hashrate onto the new fork was imperative. It worked flawlessly with miners abandoning Bitcoin to mine this new handicapped network called BTC. My conviction remains with Bitcoin, the only tech that can elevate humanity. BTC is not Bitcoin.

62372396
Its not, I bought and sold like 10 times

62372419
>>62371718
I'm a bagholder since 2018. I got some returns but I'm obviously not happy. Still much better than my Link bag which is a disaster. I always notice trends too late, being hyperliquid the latest one i missed. Still bought at 62 and will try to sell at 70+.
Unironically, hype seems the only crypto i have more faith atm even though I got like 4k riding.
My BTC bag is worth 200k atm. Sucks.
Also, i started diversifying into Nasdaq and sp500 i lost faith on BTC being he fastest vehicle and i think next bull run we'll be very lucky if we even reach 180k top. We probably get front runned at 140-150k. Still I'll be dropping heavily my bags then

62372448
>>62371718
Truly decentralised money

62372468
>>62372051
The problem with NFTs is how they have such a small market cap while being extremely illiquid on top of that. Any shitcoin ranked #320 on CoinGecko has a higher market cap than Pudgy Penguins, and 50x to 100x its trading volume. That’s an automatic turn-off for any whale that would want to invest millions in the top NFTs. These bags would be hard to sell at the right moment.

62372501
>>62372380
>mfw the real Bitcoin is only $226 today

62372915
>>62372501
>>mfw the real Bitcoin is only $226 today
lol!
bcash cucks BTFO
>we don't need POW, we will have 10-block "finalisation rule!!!"
wow, just as Satoshi intended! lamao.

62373544
>>62371807
Everyone has that plan until Bitcoin decides to never give them their entry back.

62373685
>>62372056
no, they're going to print more for the US and going to bail out the cash strapped holders of US bonds with swap lines

62374097
>>62371917
What's your entry price?

62374451
>>62372043
Depends what you're optimizing for. Some people want the next 100x. Others are happy finding ways to make their BTC a bit more productive without giving up exposure entirely.

item.title: WE ARE THE OILMARINES — 24 replies — 10.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
WE ARE THE OILMARINES

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-06-16 09:58 UTC

OP

AND WE ARE NEVER SELLING
1k eoy

Early replies (first 3)

62361102
>>62361092
kek

62361136
My real life would have unironically began if oil pumped beyond $200. Alas.

62361150
>>62361136
I was never possible. The recession that would have started at 150 would have immediately lowered the price again. Also reserve releases, flexible demand, increase of production by usa and russia, the pipeline of the saudis and more factors were always there. I told oilschizos that but they wouldnt believe me.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62361168
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

62361804
Trump.. please don't take the deal.. My oil bags..

62361809
>>62361092
No. The underlying machinery would function as is now even if it were $3 a barrel.

Oil pricing is literally about how much blood you can squeeze from the peasants

62361831
>>62361092
>>62361168
>He bought dead dinosaur blood

62364177
Gulf oil output will take years to recover, and the fraud and accounting gymnastics done to keep the price low will have to be paid for. $150 EOY

62364518
>>62364177
>>62361150

62367392
>>62361092
HODL ON MARINES

62367941
>>62361092
is there a reddit community? i need a good laugh.

62367948
>>62361092
All marines are oil marines.

62367951
>>62367941
You're posting in one.

62367975
>>62361150
oil wouldn't have recessed the world at 150 , lol oil at 150 when adjusted for inflation is still under what is was by 46 dollars in 2007

62369178
>>62367975
Kek no inflation was maybe 100% since then not 220%. And yes it would have recessed the world, as it did back then. Because you can't just x3 oil and not do it. Back then the absolute numbers were higher, but the world was used to it. Now the world is used to cheap oil.

62370088
>>62364532
The singularity will happen pirate

62373205

62373242

wrong, jew

62373318

62373409

62374376
>>62373242

>see everyone not believing the official numbers is a nutcase
The official numbers are too low, but the real numbers are slightly above 100%.

62374508
>>62374364
Your 9000 gazillion market cap is made through 4% (75B$ at its IPO price) of the floating... Meaning you only have to pump out the measly 4%/75B to make the remaining 96% pump by as much, without needing the money to do it.

62374567

when bitcoin exploded transaction fees and times made it absolutely fucking useless
and all of the cheap and low transaction alternatives are insecure, buggy, and dogshit

item.title: "He didn't buy SPCX" edition >Educational sites: >Financial TV Streams: >Charts: >Screeners: >Gambling: >Pre-Market and… — 10 replies — 8.4/hr

"He didn't buy SPCX" edition >Educational sites: >Financial TV Streams: >Charts: >Screeners: >Gambling: >Pre-Market and…

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-06-16 11:09 UTC

OP

"He didn't buy SPCX" edition

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners:
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars:
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101:
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

>Previous >>62372298

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 25 replies — 40.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-06-16 11:44 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62373803
>>62373772
You are posting anime. NGMI.

62373818
>>62373772
>>62373799
>>62373803
I hope you all have less than $10k

62373831
>tripfag is a brokie

Color me surprised.

62373838
>>62373818
I am 47 and I make $165k a year. Seethe.

62373864
>>62373838
Funny, I'm 27. A 20 year gap. Wouldn't mind being 17 again.

62373866
>>62373803
Posting animu has been a very effective method to gatekeep and single out posters which do not belong. You need to go back.
>>62373798
I wanted to propose pic related. Her name's in the filename and is practically a dead meme from an era long past. We already have pink wojaks so there's already some cross pollination plus there's a good chunk of her content being collected in a booru.

62373871
>>62373866
Okay, bro. Go gatekeep /reddit

62373881
>>62373752
I made the six figure club with stocks and crypto. Lost most of it. Now I’m trying to make it again and more with just stocks after a long hiatus. I realized I’ve been over diversifying. Growing a small account fast will require fewer but larger bets. And patience for a good entry.

62373888
>>62373866
Okay
First order of business settled.

Next order of business.

$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$

Let's brainstorm. I think we should find something to learn. This thing can't be too mainstream, can't be too complex for our brains, and must be fun enough to encourage people to come back to these threads. We shall do this [subject] for x amount of threads and if NOTHING substantial comes from it, we move on to a new [subject]

62373902
>>62373888
I've seen a couple of drawfags post on /biz/ with a pressing question about how to monetize their art. What I'm about to suggest will definitely delete these threads because it involves a venture which for whatever reason jannies/mods will see it as "advertising" some personal project. If you're serious about starting a fun /biz/ related hobby we should brainstorm elsewhere without interference.

62373918
>>62373902
Will you stop crying about jannies??????

I will go ahead and do the brainstorming since you're terrified of the meek. Your cowardice is really annoying. Like you're begging them to delete it, first post in this thread and it's you putting ideas into the heads of jannies.

Give me one moment while I gather my thoughts, it might take a few minutes as I'd like to lay out multiple ventures that will appeal to a wide amount of sensibilities and then we will converge on one.

62373951
I have to wage in the morning.
It's too much to ask for this thread to last until then.
So for now, we have accomplished one thing.

I shall go to bed and tomorrow we will begin discussing various money making opportunities. I will try to put myself into as many different shoes as I can. Can millions be made? Unlikely. Can $1 be made? VERY likely. Goodnight anons.

62373961
>>62373951
Yeah it's about that time for me too, but I still think we should really start a group elsewhere.

62374042
>>62373866
>>62373881
>>62373888
>>62373918
>>62373951
>>62373961

Kys’selves anime fags

62374054
>>62373752
>devise ways to gain a spot at the table
DCA crypto. It's literally your only hope. Good luck.

62374086
>>62373752
>In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.
I'm in the six figure club. Six figure salary, six figure portfolio. There is no six figure club, six figures isn't enough to do anything, your life doesn't change. You still have to wageslave like any other poorfag.

62374140
We buy and hold sealed Pokémon card booster boxes

62374144
>>62373866
>Posting animu has been a very effective method to gatekeep
True!

>>62373881
I came to a similar realization, being diversified just isn't going to help me get rich fast. I need less plays and they need to succeed well.

62374193
>>62373752
what stocks are we buying

62374471
>>62373752
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62374533
anyone wants to learn about photonics? some stocks in that area have gone ballistic, i'm talking 10000% returns in 4 years

62374614
>>62373752
$8k nw fag reporting in

I bought spacex at ATH so I'm doing to 3-fig nw pretty soon wish me luck

item.title: Law of the jungle — 170 replies — 37.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Law of the jungle

Open thread • Replies: 170 • Updated: 2026-06-16 07:48 UTC

OP

>I am a million billion trillionair-
>BAM BAM BAM
>STAB STAB STAB
W-WHY AM I DYING I AM RICH AND HAVE MONEY ROCKETS CARS AIEEEEEE
P-PLEASE SIRE SAVE M-
>BAM BAM BAM
NOOOO WHY IS MONEY USELESS WHY WHY WHY WAAAAH PLEASE SIR
I WILL GIVE YOU EVERYTHIN-
>STAB HIS KIDS
AAAAAAH MY KIDDIES MY BLOODLINE WHY WHY
PLEASE SIR THE TRILLION MONEY
ACK

Early replies (first 3)

62359354
>>62359336
a mentally buck busted normie is going to say """the law""" grants the rich physical immunity.... and even if it doesn't, they have like, body guards who are omnipotent, omniscient, and omnipresent. you can't do ANYTHING to the rich!!!! it's literally impossible!!!!!

62359360
>>62359336
We live in capitalism and I'm protected by the pigs u need to learn how to move nigga

62359387
>nigger tier envy thread
>/biz/

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62370770
Lmao actual cryptokikes and kikes defending the rich

62370820
>>62361047
>rich
>intelligence
Only room in your bag for one, I'm afraid.

62370830
>>62362126
>let the smart people do the things that make society go
This is what speculators actually believe.

62371364
>>62370741
>upheld
It....isn't?
We had a wildly successful capitalistic system in the 'west' for the last 300 years, and a facsimile of one for the last century (thanks smoke and mirrors fiat), with increasingly onerous compliance demands by the state that start to decouple free markets toward state operated markets (which is far closer to the current paradigm). State regulated markets fucking suck and are a constantly changing landscape of chosen winners and losers based on which group is in power at any one time. Markets are wavering and unstable, currencies are starting to decouple, and global stability is starting to crack under the weight of unnatural (government mandated) migration and capital flows.
Don't ask disingenuous questions, for they open a two way window into your mind (which isn't a compliment)

62371408
>>62359336
thats why we gate keep niggers like that away from us via invitation only or simply not walking near them or anywhere around them your response? ever see batman?

62371411
>>62359336
im basically batman

62371435
>>62365552
I made it. From living in a 1975 Ford maverick to having land and houses and a wife and 3 kids. Go fucking jump, you're a useless eater and only a burden to the rest of us. Fucking pathetic faggot.

62371440
>>62371408
Yeah stay in your house Timmy
Don't let us see you in any cities or public areas

62371441
>>62365566
More than you, pal.

62371449
>>62371435
I will kill all of them and molest their corpses. I'll send you a DVD

62371454
>>62371441
you didn't answer the question. >>62360783

62371459
>>62371449
YOU
WONT
DO
SHIT

62371463
>>62371440
at least i have a house

62371468
>>62371459
I'm tracing your IP as we speak. Prepare for the storm that is coming, maggot

62371472
watch out yall the "people" are trying to uhhhhhhhhh idk

62372199
i stand undefeated

62372328
>>62372199
>undefeated
Then you are clearly not mr john communism

62373377
>>62371463
Slave mentality. If you are not born upper class you'll never be more than a piece of cattle to them. To be extracted, abused, slaughtered, and thrown onto the rubbish pile of the forgotten.
The only way to regain your honour and dignity is by fighting them to the death and replacing their ranks entirely with your own.
They like to claim that they in their positions because they're smarter and more capable. They are not. They are more ruthless, more violent and that's all it ever was!

62373388
We have nothing to lose but our chains! What do we have else? Our lives? Life will pass before you know it, make it count you cowards!

62373610
class cucks went real quiet

62373692
>>62365676
>lectures about being a sociopath for buying and selling stuff
>unironically aspires to murder strangers in cold blood out of envy
your brain on communism

62373696
>>62373692
welcome to the real world, pussy
Those "strangers" are vampires drunk on my blood and the blood of my brothers and my ancestors

62373718
>>62373696
Nothing "real world" about uttering two antithetical ideas in the same breath. It also doesn't make you tough. Just retarded.

62373727
>>62373718
I hope you know what happens to class traitors :)

62373746
>>62373727
>whining on 4chan since 2007
>but now his depressed drunken tough talk is totez 4 realz
you won't do shit

62373751
>>62373746
and you're too pussy to even talk shit about your masters

62373760
i suddenly feel very horny

62373773
>>62373751
>toothless impotent rage makes me a badass!
kek

62374025
>>62373773

62374136
>>62359336

62369568

62369572

62369613
>>62369572

62369620

62369632
>>62369613
same I hope it drops back into the 150s at least, so I can buy with leverage when SPCH is open to buy

62369635
>>62369613
STOP BUYING YOU MODERBITCH!! WHY DONT YOU UNDERTAND SIR? SPCX IS OVERVALUED SIR. SIR YOU NEED TO SHORT, NOT BUY SIR!!

62369672
>>62369613

62369679
>>62369672

62369688
>>62369679

62369703
>>62369688

>goofed
stay poor

62369735
>>62369703

and
>audited

62369981
>>62369156

LIFTOFF!
173 $

62370031
baggies about to get BTFO, like all IPO's.

62370155

62370179
>>62369167
>mfw I only bought 7
I should of bought more bros

62370206
>>62370179
It's not too late.

62370723
ONE HUNDRED SEVENTY.SEVEN

62370740
>>62369442
Kekd

62370753
I don't buy hype, even if it works. Betting on the stupidity of investors is always a road to disaster.

62370827
Just remember /biz/ did hardcore shill movements against getting SPCX. You know what /biz/ is now. The TAM says we are going to 22k a share.

62370863
>>62369735
Go back to retardit to seethe over Elon faggot

62370892
>>62370827
You are literally the embodiment of /biz though.

62373182
>>62370827
The TAM that divides up as over $20,000 per year from every single human being on the planet being spent on SpaceX? More than people spend on their food and housing? Yeah, any day now we'll all start shelling out our monthly $1700 SpaceX subscriptions for... Uhh...

62373198
>>62373182
i saw a 20 million dollar buy order go thru
and 20k is the exact amound my dad spent, we were on the phone and both skeptical but somehow both ended up talking ourselves into buying some

i only have 5

62373509
WHY IS IT 200 IN AFTERMARKET

NO NO NO NO NO FUCK ELON!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

62373622
>>62373509
We're going to the moon. A rocket doesn't stop after liftoff.

62373806
>>62369447
>that many high-iq niggers making sub 50
Sad...

62374115
>>62373198
No dummy, not $20,000 in stock.
They project their revenue to be receiving $20,000, in cash, from every single human being on the planet, every single year. That's where the TAM comes from.

They expect this to happen from people "Buying their AI services."

Yes, they genuinely expect every single human being on the planet, even the lowest african mud hut dwellers, to send them $20,000+ a year for AI services. Space rocket company btw.

62374405
>>62374115
You're not accounting for the fact that AI agents will be paying for their own compute and they will outnumber humans 1:100

62374409
>>62370753
this
